sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Hoihna leh A Thutaklo Ama Mite A Lunggulhna

verses.text: Eite' thahatna Pasian' tungah nakpi takin la sa un la, Jakob Pasian' tungah lungdamin awng un
La khat phuangin, khuangno tumin, a ngaih laia khausai lasakna leh harp khausai lasakna limtakin tum un
Khadet, khalik, i pawi ni-in peengkul tum un
Bang hang hiam cih leh, tua bang hih ding pen Israel-te-a' dingin thukham hi a, Jakob Pasian' biakna ngeina a kip khat ahi hi
Egypt gamah a pai lai-un Israel mite' tungah thupiakna-in amah in a neih ahi hi. Ka theih ngeiloh kampau khat hih bangin ka za hi
“Na liangko uh-a om na vangikte uh ka hong lakkhiatsak a, na khut uh-a vangikte ka hong khiasak hi
Na cihmawh uh ciangin kei na hong sam uh a, keimah in note ka hong honkhia hi. A kilanglo vanging sung panin note ka hong dawng a, Meribah tui phualte-ah note ka hong ze-et hi
Ka mite aw, note kong thuhilh laitakin limtakin hong ngai un. Israel-te aw, keima thu a hong ngai hi hoh le-uh cin
Note' lakah pasian dang omlo ding a, pasian dang khat' mai-ah na kun kei ding uh hi
Egypt gam panin note a hong lakhia, Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Na kam uh a golin ka un, keimah in kong dimsak ding hi
“Ahih hangin ka mite in keima thu hong ngailo uh a, Israel-te in keima thu themkha zong zuilo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin a ut bangun a gamta dingin amau' lungsim khauhna bangin ka gamtasak hi
Ka mite in ka thu hong ngai-in, keima deih bangin Israel a gamta hi leh
Amau' galte khempeuh ka zawhsak pak ding a, amau' galte langpangin ka khut ka lik ding hi
Kei a hong mudahte ka mai-ah hong kun ding uh a, amaute' gimthuakna kip paisuak ding hi
Mangbuh hoihpen tawh note ka hong vak ding a, suangpi pana khuaizu tawh note kong gilvahsak ding hi,” a ci hi.
